_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 500

observed.note: BOSS-MECHANIC-2 (2026-07-14): added 'The Obsidian Warden' (red grade 'W'), the SECOND boss combat mechanic — a WARD that raises a barrier absorbing every 3rd LANDED hero blow (lj.enemy.warded in js/enemy.js; the fight loop in js/combat.js counts heroStrikes and zeroes damage on strikeCount % interval === 0). It is a DEFENSIVE foil to the Cinderwyrm's enrage: instead of hitting harder while dying, it refuses to die on schedule — the hero must sink ~1.5x the blows, dragging the duel out and handing the boss more swings, which feeds boss-attrition (still the dominant deep loss mode, 2707 boss vs 1039 room here, ~72%). REACHABILITY: lj.enemy.bossGradeForRealm now ALTERNATES the two apex identities by realm parity so a deep run faces BOTH — 'T' Cinderwyrm on odd realms 5/7/9, 'W' Warden on even 6/8/10 (both grades live only on red, the clamped realm-5+ family); the selfplay harness fights bossGradeForRealm so both mechanics are measured. Wired via isBoss('W') + hero.js creaturesAndItemsMap + scene.js spriteMap (reuses boss sprite [0,9]). BALANCE: raw HP set LOW at 82 (ward wastes ~1/3 of hits -> ~123 effective, apex range) with FLAT [5,7] offense and untouched [5,2] armor/defense — the ward carries the threat, not the stat block. Tuned to a Cinderwyrm PEER + load-bearing, both sim-measured: an HP sweep (3000/arm) put the isolated Warden (all deep = W) at 42.4%@70, 40.5%@76, 39.2%@82, 37.9%@88; picked 82 because isolated-W ~39% is dead level with the Cinderwyrm's ~38.5% (isolated all-T), so alternating them holds the shipped rate near baseline. Ward is load-bearing: isolated A/B (all-W, ward off vs on) swings ~6pt (49.1% off vs 42.9% on at HP 70, 4000 runs) — well beyond noise, comparable to the Cinderwyrm's enrage A/B. RESULT: shipped --check reads 37.6% (2254/6000) — IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, ~12.6pt floor margin, deeps avg ~realm 6.75 (deepest 10). Slightly below the 39.1% pre-Warden baseline: intentional, the Warden is a real new apex threat on even deep realms. STRUCTURAL gate green (26,400 rooms). REAL-BROWSER verified: 400 Warden fights all ran clean, every warded hit dealt 0 damage, both outcomes occurred, zero throws; every tile symbol incl 'W' paints without crashing; boss-grade reachability 5->T 6->W 7->T 8->W confirmed. CARRIED-FORWARD GOTCHA: gScore (combat.js) sums all stats equally, so armor/defense-heavy loot auto-equips over equal-scored offense and DILUTES boss-attrition wins — keep new loot offense/HP-first. The realm-scaling exponent in lj.enemy.base stays the primary GLOBAL difficulty lever for future rebalances. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
